game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Kingdom Rush Vengeance TD Game**: Players defend against waves of 60+ enemy types by strategically placing and upgrading 22 unique towers along predefined paths on 42 stages across 9 realms, using a tap-to-place interface and tapping towers to access 3-4 upgrade tiers and activate special abilities. Heroes, controlled via drag-and-drop, gain experience points from combat, leveling up to unlock new active and passive skills from a talent tree, and can be equipped with 10+ artifacts for stat boosts. Gold earned during waves is spent on in-level tower upgrades, while stars awarded for stage completion (up to 3 per stage) are used for persistent meta-upgrades like increased tower damage or hero stats across all levels. The game offers 4 difficulty settings (Casual, Normal, Veteran, Impossible) and challenges like Heroic and Iron modes, with a loss condition triggered if 20 enemies bypass defenses.
game_info.description: Defend your dark kingdom against waves of heroic invaders! Strategically place powerful towers along enemy paths, upgrade them during battle, and deploy your hero to turn the tide. Earn gold to strengthen defenses, collect stars for permanent upgrades, and survive increasingly challenging waves. Prevent 20 enemies from reaching the end or face defeat!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move hero character
Space: Place/Select tower at hero location
Z: Upgrade selected tower or activate hero ability
Shift: Sell selected tower
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic tower placement mechanics and validates that towers can be placed at valid locations and attack enemies. Ensures the game loop functions correctly with automated inputs.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move hero to strategic positions along the path and place towers. Wait for enemies to spawn and verify towers engage them. Place multiple towers to test resource management.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Towers are successfully placed at valid locations, consume gold resources, and engage enemies within range. The game remains stable without errors throughout the test.
TEST_1.description: Tests basic tower placement mechanics and validates that towers can be placed at valid locations and attack enemies. Ensures the game loop functions correctly with automated inputs.
TEST_1.strategy: Move hero to strategic positions along the path and place towers. Wait for enemies to spawn and verify towers engage them. Place multiple towers to test resource management.
TEST_1.expected: Towers are successfully placed at valid locations, consume gold resources, and engage enemies within range. The game remains stable without errors throughout the test.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal winning strategy by implementing efficient tower placement, upgrading, and hero deployment. Validates that the win condition (surviving all waves) is achievable.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Place towers at optimal chokepoints early in the game. Upgrade high-value towers to increase damage output. Use hero abilities strategically to eliminate tough enemies. Balance economy between tower placement and upgrades.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully defend against all enemy waves with fewer than 20 enemies passing through. Achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state, validating the game is winnable with proper strategy.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests hero movement and combat mechanics. Validates that the hero can navigate the map, engage enemies, and level up through combat experience.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Move hero around the map using arrow keys. Position hero near enemy paths to engage in combat. Verify hero gains experience and levels up, unlocking new abilities.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Hero successfully moves across the map, attacks nearby enemies, gains experience points, and levels up. Hero abilities become available and can be activated.
TEST_3.description: Tests hero movement and combat mechanics. Validates that the hero can navigate the map, engage enemies, and level up through combat experience.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests tower upgrade system and validates that upgrades improve tower effectiveness. Ensures upgrade costs and tier progression work correctly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Place initial towers, accumulate gold from defeating enemies, then upgrade towers through multiple tiers. Observe damage and attack speed improvements.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Towers successfully upgrade through tiers, consuming appropriate gold amounts. Upgraded towers show improved stats and visual changes, dealing more damage to enemies.
TEST_4.description: Tests tower upgrade system and validates that upgrades improve tower effectiveness. Ensures upgrade costs and tier progression work correctly.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests economy and resource management by validating gold earning, spending, and the star collection system for meta-upgrades.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Complete waves to earn gold and stars. Verify gold is awarded for enemy kills. Test that stars are accumulated for completing stages and can be spent on meta-upgrades.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Gold is properly awarded and deducted. Stars are earned for wave completion. Meta-upgrade system allows spending stars for permanent bonuses that persist across games.
